title: Turkish-Style Steak Wrap
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make wrap filled with charred steak, served with a side of crispy flatbread.

ingredients.name: Minced steak
ingredients.notes: High-quality cut, preferably ribeye or strip loin

ingredients.name: Turkish seasoning
ingredients.notes: Typically includes oregano, thyme, and cumin

instructions: Season the steak with salt, pepper, and Turkish seasoning. Grill for 4-5 minutes per side for medium-rare.
Char the flatbread on the grill for 1-2 minutes per side, or until crispy.
Slice the steak into thin strips.
Warm the flatbread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven at 350°F (180°C) for 5 minutes.
Assemble the wrap by placing the charred steak on the flatbread, then topping with minced garlic, parsley, and a drizzle of olive oil.
